ocr_findings.description: Section heading for 注釈 uses '## 0-9 注釈' in OCR; image shows '●● 注釈' with filled-circle bullet markers — the bullet symbols are misread as '0-9', changing the visual heading format

プログラム例 table: OCR renders the two-column code example as a markdown table with columns 'プログラム例 | 注釈' where the image has a single header label 'プログラム例 注釈' above a code block — minor structural difference, content preserved
'試験にはコレが出る！' banner partially misread as 'つし' in OCR — stylised icon text, cosmetic only

reviewer_notes: Section 09-07 プログラミング① 基礎知識, covering the 注釈 (comment) topic plus the 4 basic programming terms summary. Main issue is the ●● bullet marker for the 注釈 heading being misread as '0-9'. All explanatory prose, the two comment-style examples (//, /* */), and the 試験コレ summary are otherwise faithfully reproduced.
